removals.reason: pre-v1 Frame adds terminal ExitCode so a final stream Snapshot preserves command exit projection through the Control-owned broker
pre-v1 approval request adds the SDK durable pause identity for Control-owned approval correlation
pre-v1 approval payload retains normalized ACP ToolCall kind, title, status, raw output, and content so child permissions round-trip without loss
pre-v1 Event adds typed child origin and approval request identity required for durable M2 replay without reconstructing semantic relations from display metadata
pre-v1 Control mutation purposes add explicit session lifecycle authority so semantic close can overlap a cancelling Runtime lease without using an anonymous bypass
pre-v1 StateWriter replaces legacy unfenced signatures with request-scoped revision CAS and explicit mutation authority so durable semantic state cannot bypass an active Session lease
pre-v1 low-level Store adopts the request-scoped State mutation contract and returns the exact committed Session for revision-aware recovery
